current_commit_message: Add copy of tests for parse_type.parse.
Provide more generic way to compute group_count for regexp match objects.
Add paver support for project tasks.
UPDATE/FIX: paver 1.2.2 support (sys is no longer imported).
UPDATE: parse == 1.8.0 Update additional parts (like: coverage, tox, pytest) to newer versions.
Various cleanups to bring project to current state. REPLACE: paver => invoke
Drop official support for Python2.6 (no longer tested).
Allow to test Python2.6 at least: Lacks some assertion helpers from unittest2, provided as part of Python2.7 unittest and newer.
Add basic precision support (based on: parse). PEP8 whitespace cleanup.
UPDATE: Test code of parse module to version 1.8.2
invoke tasks: Provide basic dry-run support.
Do not install enum34 on python 3.4 and higher
Additional cleanups related to #11 (adds missing ordereddict for python2.6).
UPDATE to parse-1.8.3 (was: parse-1.8.2). NOTE: ``parse`` module and ``parse_type.parse`` module are now identical.
BUMP-VERSION: 0.5.1 (was: 0.5.0) Add parse_type.cfparse.Parser(..., case_sensitive=False, ...) parameter to match functionality in parse.Parser constructor (in parse-1.8.4).
UPDATE: invoke tasks (and invoke vendor-bundle, use: 1.2.0).
FIX: Python3 DeprecationWarning for regex (here: in docstrings).
UPDATE: Merge-in latest changes from parse-1.12.1
* UPDATE: CHANGELOG * FIX: pyproject.toml, setup.py (classifier: LICENSE related)
FIXES #21: Avoid weird problems w/ tests/test_parse.py
DEVELOP-SUPPORT: Add checker for github-workflow YAML files
CI: Add python 3.14.0-rc.1 (as experimental python version).
